name: Formula 1
description: The highest class of international racing for open-wheel single-seater formula racing cars.

name: IndyCar Series
description: The premier level of open-wheel racing in North America.

name: MotoGP
description: The premier class of motorcycle road racing events held on road circuits.

name: WeatherTech SportsCar Championship
description: The premier sports car racing series in the United States and Canada.

name: Super GT
description: The top level of sports car racing in Japan.

name: British GT Championship
description: A sports car racing series based in the United Kingdom featuring GT3 and GT4 cars.

name: British Touring Car Championship
description: A touring car racing series held each year in the United Kingdom.

name: Supercars Championship
description: The premier motorsport category in Australasia.

name: World Rally Championship
description: The highest level of global competition in the motorsport discipline of rallying.

name: NASCAR Cup Series
description: The top racing series of the National Association for Stock Car Auto Racing.

name: FIM Endurance World Championship
description: The premier worldwide endurance motorcycle racing championship.

name: Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters
description: A grand touring car series based in Germany.

name: Formula E
description: A motorsport championship for electric cars.

name: F1 Academy
description: An all-female single-seater racing championship founded by Formula One.

name: World Endurance Championship
description: The premier global endurance auto racing championship.

name: Formula 2
description: The second-tier open-wheel racing championship leading to Formula 1.
